'''竏營-dh-n-t''' ('''kazadhnetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queal|queal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queal|queal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營-dh-n-t
|-
! Lemma
| kazadhnetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizadhnetoko|thizadhnetoko]] || [[word:jizadhnetoko|jizadhnetoko]] || [[word:shizadhnetoko|shizadhnetoko]] || [[word:kizadhnetoko|kizadhnetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzadhnetoko|thuthuzadhnetoko]] || [[word:jujuzadhnetoko|jujuzadhnetoko]] || [[word:shushuzadhnetoko|shushuzadhnetoko]] || [[word:kukuzadhnetoko|kukuzadhnetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzadhnetoko|thuzadhnetoko]] || [[word:juzadhnetoko|juzadhnetoko]] || [[word:shuzadhnetoko|shuzadhnetoko]] || [[word:kuzadhnetoko|kuzadhnetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozadhnetoko|thozadhnetoko]] || [[word:jozadhnetoko|jozadhnetoko]] || [[word:shozadhnetoko|shozadhnetoko]] || [[word:kozadhnetoko|kozadhnetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzadhnetoko|thﾃｦzadhnetoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦzadhnetoko|jﾃｦzadhnetoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦzadhnetoko|shﾃｦzadhnetoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦzadhnetoko|kﾃｦzadhnetoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazadhnetoko|thazadhnetoko]] || [[word:jazadhnetoko|jazadhnetoko]] || [[word:shazadhnetoko|shazadhnetoko]] || [[word:kazadhnetoko|kazadhnetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
